item.title: SCALOROCK 3 — Chieti Scalo, 2002
item.author: Luca Cipressi
item.description: SCALOROCK 3 took place on 21 June 2002 in Piazzale Guglielmo Marconi, the square in front of the railway station of Chieti Scalo, Abruzzo. It was a summer night of local rock, blues and metal, staged in a place that was never just a transit point for us: it was a meeting ground, a familiar border between the hillside city of Chieti and the flatter, louder, more improvised life around the station.
